[Sale Terms](https://www.ivo.sk/4635/en/e-shop/sale-terms) | | [Home](https://www.ivo.sk/106/en/home) \| [Slovensky](https://www.ivo.sk/92/sk/uvod) \| [Sitemap](https://www.ivo.sk/117/en/sitemap) \| [RSS](https://www.ivo.sk/3891/en/rss-service) \| [Contact](https://www.ivo.sk/123/en/contact) | | | | --- | --- | | | [search](javascript:formGlobalSearchCheck(true);) | Fighting disinformation and foster fact-based public debates **Supported by:**  OSIFE. **Cooperating institution:** Political Capital (Budapest) – project’s leader, Prague Security Studies Institute (Prague), Sastre Consulting (Poland). **Project span:** April – May 2020. **Project team:** Grigorij Mesežnikov, Ján Bartoš. **Objective:**  To map the spread of disinformation and conspiracy content in V-4 countries during the  COVID19 pandemic through statistical and narrative analysis. **Project outputs:** [Analytical study](https://www.politicalcapital.hu/pc-admin/source/documents/OSF_PC_V4Infodemic_COVID_20200819.pdf) [>\> Back to Projects](https://www.ivo.sk/108/en/projects) **[V4 at the Time of Polycrisis. Public Perception](https://www.ivo.sk/8945/en/news/v4-at-the-time-of-polycrisis-public-perception- "V4 at the Time of Polycrisis. Public Perception")** **[Словаччина та Україна: перспективи співпраці та гравці](https://www.ivo.sk/8947/en/news/slovachchina-ta-ukraina-perspektivi-spivpraci-ta-gravci "Словаччина та Україна: перспективи співпраці та гравці")** V4 is primarily based on cooperation in the domain of politics. But how is it perceived by the inhabitants of individual countries? Analysis of the situation and prospects for development in two areas related to Slovakia's attitudes towards Ukraine. [![V4 at the Time of Polycrisis. Public Perception](https://www.ivo.sk/buxus/images/uputavky_vpravo/Book_V4_2024-ENG.jpg)](https://www.ivo.sk/8945/en/news/v4-at-the-time-of-polycrisis-public-perception- "V4 at the Time of Polycrisis. Public Perception") [![Словаччина та Україна: перспективи співпраці та гравці](https://www.ivo.sk/buxus/images/uputavky_vpravo/Book_Slovensko_a_Ukrajina_UA.jpg)](https://www.ivo.sk/8947/en/news/slovachchina-ta-ukraina-perspektivi-spivpraci-ta-gravci "Словаччина та Україна: перспективи співпраці та гравці") * * * **[Russia's war against Ukraine: A view from Slovakia](https://www.ivo.sk/8873/en/news/russia-s-war-against-ukraine-a-view-from-slovakia "Russia's war against Ukraine: A view from Slovakia")** **[Thirty Years of Slovak Security and Defence Policy](https://www.ivo.sk/8916/en/news/thirty-years-of-slovak-security-and-defence-policy "Thirty Years of Slovak Security and Defence Policy")** Attitudes of representatives of institutions and politicians towards Russian aggression & public opinion. The key areas of the development of the country’s security and defence sector in 1993-2023. [![Russia's war against Ukraine: A view from Slovakia](https://www.ivo.sk/buxus/images/uputavky_vpravo/Book_RUS_UA_SK-eng.jpg)](https://www.ivo.sk/8873/en/news/russia-s-war-against-ukraine-a-view-from-slovakia "Russia's war against Ukraine: A view from Slovakia") [![Thirty Years of Slovak Security and Defence Policy](https://www.ivo.sk/buxus/images/uputavky_vpravo/Book_Defence.jpg)](https://www.ivo.sk/8916/en/news/thirty-years-of-slovak-security-and-defence-policy "Thirty Years of Slovak Security and Defence Policy") * * * **[Who Is Playing Russian Roulette in Slovakia](https://www.ivo.sk/8794/en/news/new-ivo-publication-who-is-playing-russian-roulette-in-slovakia "Who Is Playing Russian Roulette in Slovakia")** **[Taiwanese-European Autumn 2021: A View from Slovakia](https://www.ivo.sk/8807/en/news/new-ivo-publication "Taiwanese-European Autumn 2021: A View from Slovakia")** What encourages some actors to promote ties with a declining power with aggressive foreign policy and undemocratic regime? Factors that influence the country’s bilateral relations with EU member states in Central and Eastern Europe. [![Who Is Playing Russian Roulette in Slovakia](https://www.ivo.sk/buxus/images/uputavky_vpravo/Book_Russian_Roulette.jpg)](https://www.ivo.sk/8794/en/news/new-ivo-publication-who-is-playing-russian-roulette-in-slovakia "Who Is Playing Russian Roulette in Slovakia") [![Taiwanese-European Autumn 2021: A View from Slovakia](https://www.ivo.sk/buxus/images/uputavky_vpravo/book_Taiwan_EN_2021.jpg)](https://www.ivo.sk/8807/en/news/new-ivo-publication "Taiwanese-European Autumn 2021: A View from Slovakia") * * * **[Conspiracy Theories in Europe](https://www.ivo.sk/7534/en/news/conspiracy-theories-in-europe-a-compilation "Conspiracy Theories in Europe")** **[Tiso's Ghost in 2016 Slovakia](https://www.ivo.sk/7975/en/news/tiso-s-ghost-in-2016-slovakia "Tiso's Ghost in 2016 Slovakia")** Collection of analytical studies from experts from Great Britain, France, Norway, Hungary, Poland and Slovakia. Confronting the dark sides of the past and considering the participation of Christians in public life. [![Conspiracy Theories in Europe](https://www.ivo.sk/buxus/images/uputavky_vpravo/Book_Conspiracy-small.jpg)](https://www.ivo.sk/7534/en/news/conspiracy-theories-in-europe-a-compilation "Conspiracy Theories in Europe") [![Tiso's Ghost in 2016 Slovakia](https://www.ivo.sk/buxus/images/uputavky_vpravo/Book_ghost.jpg)](https://www.ivo.sk/7975/en/news/tiso-s-ghost-in-2016-slovakia "Tiso's Ghost in 2016 Slovakia") | | | | | | --- | --- | | Content © 2006 Inštitút pre verejné otázky.
